chrome-bitwarden-manifest.json.notes: Bitwarden browser extension (published for Chrome and Edge).

edge-dark-reader-manifest.json.notes: Dark Reader browser extension (published for Edge and Chrome).

edge-duckduckgo-manifest.json.notes: DuckDuckGo Privacy Essentials Chromium manifest with MV3 host_permissions and managed storage.

brave-core-manifest.json.notes: Brave core extension manifest with Brave-specific MAYBE_background and webDiscovery permissions. MAYBE_background is copied exactly from the upstream Brave manifest.

chrome-youtube-summary-chatgpt-manifest..notes: Real community Chrome extension manifest targeting ChatGPT/OpenAI domains (not an official OpenAI extension).

chrome-agentbrain-chatgpt-claude-manifes.notes: Real community multi-provider extension manifest with ChatGPT/OpenAI and Claude/Anthropic host permissions (not official provider extensions).

chrome-copilottts-manifest.json.notes: Real community Chrome extension manifest focused on GitHub Copilot pages (not an official GitHub Copilot extension).
